name: Project Breakdown
description: Break a large project into manageable tasks and milestones

agents.name: Project Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze the project scope and identify major components
agents.system_prompt_hint: Break down the project into major components. Identify dependencies, risks, and required resources. Estimate relative effort for each component.

agents.name: Task Creator
agents.purpose: Create detailed task lists with milestones
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a detailed task list from the analysis. Group tasks into milestones. Add estimated durations. Identify the critical path. Format as a project plan.

suggestion_card.title: Project Breakdown
suggestion_card.subtitle: Break big projects into small tasks

author: agentfactory
